docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TOM COHEN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SAVS WINDOW TINT INC (CHRISTOPHER CANDIA) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANNIBAL THOMPSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY SAVS WINDOW TINT INC AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, HANNIBAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $120.00 SERVED MAR-20-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, HANNIBAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTOPHER CANDIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAVS WINDOW TINT INC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SAVS WINDOW TINT INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAVS WINDOW TINT INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, HANNIBAL $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SAVS WINDOW TINT INC ASSIGNED TO COLLECTRIX
